$schema_description: MCQ items for oscar-bench. Populate to 50 items before using for real replication. Each item has: id (stable string), domain (math|science|history), question (string), options (A,B,C,D). The answer key lives separately in answers.json so the bench can be run double-blind if desired.

items.question: Jake gave half of his money to his brother, then spent $5 and was left with $10. How much money did he originally have?
Two heterozygous (Aa) parents have a child. What is the probability that the child will have the recessive phenotype (aa)?
Which treaty formally ended World War I between Germany and the Allied Powers?
